Zetwerk - DevOps Intern (Internship)
Job available in Bangalore
Founded in 2017 • More than 1000 employees
Zetwerk's operates a B2B marketplace for manufacturing items. It provides buyers and suppliers collaboration tools to streamline their interactions, and execution tools to fulfil the orders effortlessly.
  • Cloud Computing
  • DevOps
  • Monitoring
  • AWS
DevOps Intern (Internship)
Zetwerk
